authoritativeReference: Existing cover and Pages 1-9; Page 9 is the story-transition reference.

pages.text: Grave Digger rolled beneath the starting arch, and the moonlight ride began. His friends followed the firm path behind him.
pages.narrationText: Grave Digger rolled beneath the starting arch, and the moonlight ride began. His friends followed the firm path behind him.
pages.illustrationScene: Grave Digger leads the same vehicle friends from beneath the Page 9 wooden arch along the firm moonlit track.
pages.continuityNotes: Direct Page 9 continuation with the same arch, moon, group, mud, lighting, and vehicle order.

pages.text: At the lantern bend, silver puddles shimmered across the track. Grave Digger slowed so every truck could see the safe turn.
pages.narrationText: At the lantern bend, silver puddles shimmered across the track. Grave Digger slowed so every truck could see the safe turn.
pages.illustrationScene: Grave Digger slows at a warm lantern-lit bend while the friends approach the firm outer turn.
pages.continuityNotes: Distinct second event with wet reflections and unchanged vehicle designs.

pages.text: A purple flag had slipped onto the road. Grave Digger stopped, and the little bulldozer gently pushed it clear.
pages.narrationText: A purple flag had slipped onto the road. Grave Digger stopped, and the little bulldozer gently pushed it clear.
pages.illustrationScene: The Page 9 yellow bulldozer gently pushes one fallen purple flag clear while Grave Digger waits.
pages.continuityNotes: Distinct gentle teamwork action; no hands and no danger.

pages.text: One by one, the friends crossed a shallow splash and climbed the soft hill. Their lights twinkled in a cheerful line.
pages.narrationText: One by one, the friends crossed a shallow splash and climbed the soft hill. Their lights twinkled in a cheerful line.
pages.illustrationScene: Grave Digger crests a low muddy hill while the friends follow single-file through a shallow reflective splash.
pages.continuityNotes: Distinct grounded hill event with no jump or race.

pages.text: Back at the starting arch, the little crowd waved and cheered. “You led a safe and wonderful ride!”
pages.narrationText: Back at the starting arch, the little crowd waved and cheered. “You led a safe and wonderful ride!”
pages.illustrationScene: Grave Digger and friends return to the arch where the same ghost and puppy cheer.
pages.continuityNotes: Gentle return celebration after the completed loop.

pages.text: Later, Grave Digger rested in his quiet garage beneath the moon. “Goodnight, mud track,” he whispered with a sleepy smile.
pages.narrationText: Later, Grave Digger rested in his quiet garage beneath the moon. “Goodnight, mud track,” he whispered with a sleepy smile.
pages.illustrationScene: Grave Digger rests alone in the warm open-front track garage with the moon outside.
pages.continuityNotes: Calm bedtime ending with dim roof lights and lightly muddy tires.
